This is the classic \"death cross\" pattern \\u2014 the bearish counterpart to ARM's \"golden alignment\". Spot-to-SMA200 spread of -26% (negative) indicates significant intermediate-term weakness; historical mean-reversion to SMA200 occurs only when this spread exceeds -40% (we're at -26%).</p>\n      <p style=\"font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.65;margin-top:10px;\">The 18-month price action shows the meltdown from $281 high to current $151 \\u2014 a -46% drawdown. ADX(14) of ${ti.adx14.toFixed(0)} indicates no trend (range-bound regime), suggesting the bearish move has exhausted and SNOW is in distribution/accumulation phase.</p>\n      <img src=\"data:image/png;base64,\" style=\"width:100%;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin:8px 0;\" alt=\"Master dashboard\"/>\n    `) : ''}}\n\n    ${{typeof reportSection === 'function' ? reportSection('Bollinger bands \\u2014 6-month zoom', `\n      <p style=\"font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.65;\">Recent action has been mean-reverting within the Bollinger bands. Band-width compression below 8% typically precedes 10%+ directional moves within 5-10 sessions. Current band-width suggests the consolidation regime may be nearing exhaustion.</p>\n      <img src=\"data:image/png;base64,\" style=\"width:100%;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin:8px 0;\" alt=\"Bollinger 6mo\"/>\n"
